title: Criminal Complaints: Group Lease Public Company Limited
text:
Group Lease Public Company Limited, a securities issuer, failed to prepare and submit (1) the reviewed financial statements for Q2/2024 (2) the reviewed financial statements for Q3/2024 (3) the audited financial statements for the year 2024 and (4) the annual registration statement / the annual report (Form 56-1 One report) for the year 2024 through the transmission system of the Stock Exchange of Thailand within the period specified in the notification.

Outcome: This case is in the process of inquiry by the inquiry official.
name: Group Lease Public Company Limited
